Other Parent not present. Respondent not present. Child Support Attorney Paul Spraggins present. Child Support Officer Valerie Riley present. Samona Taylor specially appearing for the State of California on behalf of the Department of Child Support services.

Matter is on calendar for: Hearing for Petition for Writ of Mandate

Based on the testimony and review of the pleadings, Court finds good cause to order the following: dismissed without prejudice.
